title: Program Associate
description: State Farm is seeking a Program Associate to support operational initiatives across our organization. You'll coordinate program activities, manage stakeholder communications, and ensure successful execution of key business initiatives. Work remotely for one of America's largest insurance companies committed to being a good neighbor.
responsibilities: Coordinate program activities and track progress against timelines
Support project teams with scheduling, documentation, and reporting
Communicate with stakeholders to gather requirements and provide updates
Maintain program records and develop tracking tools
Identify process improvements and recommend optimization opportunities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Project Management, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
